cases.title: Testing-plan §3 Attempt/audit coverage and §11 NFR-13 row — 100% audit completeness across failures, edits, and exports
preconditions: Testing-plan §3.1 Attempt/audit coverage block and §11 NFR verification matrix row for NFR-13 apply.
dispute-trail fixture provides failed check-in attempts, committed manual corrections, and completed export jobs across authorized scopes.
M08 Audit and Compliance module and check_in_attempts persistence use real database constraints.
steps: Enumerate all failed POST /v1/check-ins in the fixture and query check_in_attempts plus audit_logs for CheckInAttemptRecorded events.
Enumerate all committed attendance status mutations and query audit_logs for manual_update or status_finalization action types.
Enumerate all completed export jobs and query audit_logs for Export action type with actor, scope, and format fields.
Compare event counts against triggered failure, mutation, and export counts for the same correlation scope.
cases.expected: Maps to testing-plan §3.1 Attempt/audit coverage row and §11 NFR-13 minimum evidence: 100% of failed check-in attempts, manual attendance edits, and export actions are logged with structured reason/context fields and remain queryable; zero audit gaps across the three event classes (NFR-13, CMP-01, CMP-02, CMP-03).

cases.title: Check-in module boundary persists failed CheckInAttempt and audit event with structured outcome at DB transaction
preconditions: Real database transaction spans M04 Check-in Processing and M08 Audit and Compliance modules.
Open session exists with valid rotating QR; enrolled student has no success AttendanceRecord.
Test harness can supply expired qrToken to force ExpiredQr terminal outcome.
steps: Submit check-in command that fails at token validation with correlationId captured.
Query check_in_attempts for studentUserId, classSessionId, outcome ExpiredQr, attemptedAt, token reference, and correlationId.
Query audit_logs for actionType CheckInAttemptRecorded or equivalent tied to the same correlationId.
Query attendance_records to confirm no success row was inserted.
cases.expected: Failed check-in inserts one CheckInAttempt with structured outcome code, ISO-8601 attemptedAt, and correlation metadata; corresponding audit_logs row is written with outcome, sessionId, studentUserId, and context fields per NFR-13 and BR-23.

cases.title: Manual correction and export completion each commit immutable audit_logs rows at module boundary
preconditions: Integration database spans M05 Attendance Ledger, M07 Reporting/Export, and M08 Audit modules.
Closed session with Absent student exists; assigned Lecturer is within manual edit window.
Attendance rows exist in lecturer-scoped section for export job creation.
steps: Lecturer invokes PATCH attendance correction with status Manual Present, reason, and Idempotency-Key; capture correlationId.
Query audit_logs for manual_update row with actorUserId, oldStatus, newStatus, reason, and occurredAt.
Lecturer completes POST /v1/exports/attendance with csv format and scoped filters; wait for job Completed.
Query audit_logs for Export action with actorUserId, scope filter summary, format csv, and occurredAt.
cases.expected: Each committed manual edit and each completed export writes exactly one immutable audit_logs row with structured reason/context fields per permissions §7.1; mutation and export audit counts match committed action counts (NFR-13, CMP-01, CMP-02).

cases.title: SM-04 terminal failure states each produce auditable CheckInAttempt with matching structured outcome
preconditions: Integration database seeded with fixtures for Open, Closed, and cross-session token bindings.
Enrolled and not-enrolled students available; duplicate-success student has existing Present record.
Validation order short-circuit paths are individually reachable per SM-04.
steps: Drive check-in to ExpiredQr, SessionClosed, NotEnrolled, and DuplicateCheckIn terminal states.
For each path, query check_in_attempts for outcome code and attemptedAt.
For each path, query audit_logs for CheckInAttemptRecorded event with matching outcome and correlationId.
Verify AttendanceRecord remains unchanged on all failure paths.
cases.expected: Every SM-04 business-failure terminal state persists CheckInAttempt with matching structured outcome code and timestamp plus queryable audit event; AMI-02 holds with zero success mutations on failures (NFR-13, AC-18).

cases.title: Concurrent failed check-in submissions each persist distinct auditable CheckInAttempt rows
preconditions: Student already has one successful Present attendance for an Open session.
Test harness can fire parallel POST /v1/check-ins with distinct Idempotency-Key values and valid rotating QR tokens.
steps: Submit three concurrent POST /v1/check-ins for the same enrolled student and session after initial success.
Collect all API outcomes and query check_in_attempts for the student-session pair.
Query audit_logs for CheckInAttemptRecorded events tied to each request correlationId.
Verify AttendanceRecord row count and field values remain unchanged from beforeState.
cases.expected: Each concurrent duplicate path returns DuplicateCheckIn and inserts its own failed CheckInAttempt with structured outcome and timestamp; each failure has a corresponding audit_logs entry; exactly one success AttendanceRecord persists unchanged (NFR-13, BR-23).

cases.title: HTTP contract — failed POST /v1/check-ins 422 ExpiredQr is queryable via GET /v1/audit-logs
preconditions: Open class session with rotating QR token exists in test environment.
Authenticated enrolled student bearer token is available.
AcademicAdmin bearer token can query GET /v1/audit-logs.
Test clock can advance beyond token expiresAt.
steps: Advance clock past qr.expiresAt for the current session token.
Call POST /v1/check-ins with Authorization Bearer token, expired qrToken, clientTimestamp, and Idempotency-Key; capture correlationId.
Validate HTTP 422 with standard envelope where error.code is ExpiredQr.
AcademicAdmin calls GET /v1/audit-logs?actionType=CheckInAttemptRecorded&targetId={studentUserId}&from={attemptStart}&to={attemptEnd}&page=1&pageSize=25.
Verify audit entry includes outcome ExpiredQr, studentUserId, classSessionId, and occurredAt.
cases.expected: Failed check-in returns HTTP 422 with error.code ExpiredQr; committed failure is queryable via GET /v1/audit-logs with structured outcome and context fields per NFR-13 and AC-18.

cases.title: HTTP contract — manual correction and export audit entries returned by GET /v1/audit-logs
preconditions: Assigned Lecturer is authenticated with valid Bearer token.
Closed session exists with student AttendanceRecord status Absent within manual edit window.
AcademicAdmin bearer token can query audit logs per role policy.
steps: Lecturer calls PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present, reason, and Idempotency-Key; confirm HTTP 200.
Lecturer calls POST /v1/exports/attendance with csv format and scoped filters; wait until job status is Completed.
AcademicAdmin calls GET /v1/audit-logs?targetType=AttendanceRecord&targetId={studentUserId}&actionType=manual_update&from={windowStart}&to={windowEnd}.
AcademicAdmin calls GET /v1/audit-logs?actorUserId={lecturerId}&actionType=Export&from={windowStart}&to={windowEnd}.
Verify both responses return HTTP 200 with standard envelope and complete audit field sets.
cases.expected: Committed manual correction and completed export each produce queryable GET /v1/audit-logs entries with actor, timestamp, structured reason/context (old/new status and reason for edit; scope and format for export) per NFR-13, FR-29, and FR-30.

cases.title: Flow C dispute-trail audit verification — failures, manual edits, and exports queryable end-to-end
preconditions: dispute-trail fixture set from testing-plan §8.1 is loaded with mixed failure attempts, lecturer correction, and export completion.
SystemAuditor or AcademicAdmin can query GET /v1/audit-logs institution-scoped.
Known classSessionId and studentUserId anchor the dispute window.
steps: Trigger ExpiredQr failed check-in for enrolled student; record API error.code and correlationId.
Lecturer applies PATCH correction with documented reason on Absent student.
Lecturer completes scoped CSV export for the section.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs filtered by classSessionId and dispute time range across CheckInAttemptRecorded, manual_update, and Export action types.
Verify each event class includes structured reason/context fields and correlates to the triggering action.
cases.expected: End-to-end dispute trail shows 100% audit coverage: every failed attempt, committed manual edit, and completed export is present in GET /v1/audit-logs with actor, timestamp, and structured context suitable for forensic review (NFR-13, launch gate control #2).

cases.title: Documented check-in failure outcome matrix achieves 100% auditable attempt coverage
preconditions: Test matrix covers API §3.2 outcome codes: ExpiredQr, SessionNotOpen, SessionClosed, NotEnrolled, DuplicateCheckIn, GpsRequired, GpsDisabled, OutOfRadius, LowAccuracy.
Each row has a deterministic fixture to reach that terminal outcome without bypassing earlier guards incorrectly.
AcademicAdmin can query GET /v1/audit-logs after each failure.
steps: For each documented failure outcome code, trigger POST /v1/check-ins and capture HTTP status and error.code.
Query check_in_attempts filtered by studentUserId and classSessionId for each triggered failure.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs for CheckInAttemptRecorded events matching each correlationId.
Aggregate pass/fail: count failures triggered versus auditable rows persisted.
cases.expected: Every matrix failure path returns documented error.code and persists exactly one CheckInAttempt with matching structured outcome plus queryable audit_logs entry; zero failures lack auditable reason/context coverage (NFR-13, CMP-03).

cases.title: Student denied GET /v1/audit-logs without disclosing failed-attempt or export audit evidence
preconditions: dispute-trail fixture includes failed check-in attempts, manual corrections, and export audit entries for institution scope.
Student bearer token is authenticated.
AcademicAdmin token is available as authorized control.
steps: Student calls GET /v1/audit-logs?targetId={studentUserId}&classSessionId={sessionId}.
Student calls GET /v1/audit-logs?actionType=Export&from={start}&to={end}.
Student calls GET /v1/audit-logs?actionType=CheckInAttemptRecorded with no filters.
Inspect responses for partial leakage of outcome codes, old/new status, export scope, or actor identifiers.
AcademicAdmin calls the same queries as control.
cases.expected: All Student audit log queries return HTTP 403 Forbidden per AuditLog.read Deny; responses contain no audit items, failure reason codes, mutation trails, or export scope metadata; AcademicAdmin control returns 200 with full queryable audit entries (NFR-09, BR-19).

cases.title: Out-of-scope Lecturer denied export and cross-section audit log read without evidence leakage
preconditions: Lecturer L1 is assigned only to section A; section B has failed check-in audit entries and completed export audit.
Lecturer L1 bearer token is authenticated.
AcademicAdmin can query section B audit events as control.
steps: Lecturer L1 calls POST /v1/exports/attendance with filters targeting section B classSectionId.
Lecturer L1 calls GET /v1/audit-logs filtered to section B CheckInAttemptRecorded and Export events.
Inspect denial responses for partial export rows or audit payload leakage.
AcademicAdmin queries section B audit logs as control.
cases.expected: Out-of-scope export returns HTTP 403 OutOfScope or Forbidden without generating completed export audit; cross-section audit query returns 403 without disclosing failure outcomes, edit trails, or export scope from section B (PRM-01, PRM-09, NFR-13 read boundary).

cases.title: GET /v1/audit-logs pagination returns complete dispute-trail entries across page boundaries
preconditions: dispute-trail fixture includes at least 30 audit entries spanning failed attempts, manual corrections, and exports for one class section.
AcademicAdmin bearer token is authenticated within institution scope.
Events span a bounded from/to window with known total count.
steps: Query GET /v1/audit-logs?classSectionId={sectionId}&from={rangeStart}&to={rangeEnd}&page=1&pageSize=25.
Verify HTTP 200, meta.pagination page=1, pageSize=25, totalItems >= 30, and totalPages >= 2.
Record audit entry IDs from page 1 and verify each row includes actionType, actor, occurredAt, and structured context fields.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs with same filters and page=2; verify distinct IDs with no overlap and union covers all fixture events.
cases.expected: Paginated audit query honors page and pageSize invariants; all NFR-13 event classes (failures, edits, exports) remain queryable across pages with complete reason/context fields and no cross-scope count leakage.

cases.title: SystemAuditor browser journey — PG-15 audit log table shows failed attempts, manual edits, and export actions
preconditions: SystemAuditor is logged in on desktop browser.
dispute-trail fixture has failed ExpiredQr attempt, lecturer manual correction, and completed CSV export in scoped section.
PG-15 audit log review route /audit/logs is available per FLOW-13.
steps: Navigate to /audit/logs and confirm audit log table loads with default timestamp desc sort.
Filter by classSessionId or actionType CheckInAttemptRecorded and locate failed check-in row with outcome code column.
Filter by actionType manual_update and verify old status, new status, reason, and actor columns.
Filter by actionType Export and verify actor, scope summary, format, and timestamp columns.
Paginate to page 2 if total exceeds pageSize and confirm no duplicate or missing dispute-trail entries.
cases.expected: Audit log UI surfaces 100% of dispute-trail events with structured reason/context columns for failures (outcome code), manual edits (old/new/reason), and exports (scope/format); pagination preserves completeness per NFR-13 forensic review requirements.

cases.title: Student browser journey blocked from audit log surfaces that expose failure and export evidence
preconditions: Student is logged in on mobile or desktop browser.
dispute-trail audit data exists for sessions including the student's failed check-in attempts.
Application shell may expose /audit/logs or admin navigation routes.
steps: Navigate personal attendance history and observe absence of audit log navigation links.
Attempt direct URL navigation to /audit/logs.
Verify access-denied state, redirect, or empty unauthorized view without displaying failure outcome codes, export scope, or other actors' audit evidence.
Confirm student check-in failure UI on PG-02 shows localized reason without exposing institution-wide audit trails.
cases.expected: Student cannot browse audit log listing or detail UI; no failure audit evidence, export metadata, or cross-student dispute trails are disclosed in browser surfaces (AuditLog.read Deny, NFR-09, BR-19).
